channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Dodgers will start Yamamoto against San Diego's Darvish in winner-take-all Game 5 of NLDS
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani will get his wish to see Los Angeles Dodgers teammate Yoshinobu Yamamoto face off against San Diego's Yu Darvish in Game 5 of the National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tennis legend Rafael Nadal, 22-time Grand Slam champ, announces retirement
item.description: Rafael Nadal, professional tennis legend and 22-time Grand Slam champion announced his retirement in a video message early Thursday morning.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, KTLA 5

item.title: PHOTOS: Padres and Dodgers face off in game 1 of the NLDS
item.description: The San Diego Padres are continuing their postseason journey in game one of the NLDS against the Dodgers after defeating the Braves earlier this week in the NL Wild Card Series.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Dodgers' Kershaw, Guardians' Lively, Tigers' Mize and Yankees' Stroman are left off ALDS rosters
item.description: Pitchers Clayton Kershaw and Joe Kelly were left off the Los Angeles Dodgers' roster for their NL Division Series against the San Diego Padres that started Saturday. San Diego added right-handers Martín Pérez and Alek Jacob, who were skipped from the Wild Card Series roster against Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake ready for road test: Unbeaten streak at stake against San Jose Earthquakes
item.description: Real Salt Lake (4th place Western Conference, 53 points) kept a clean sheet at home against Minnesota on Wednesday and now head back on the road with a four-match unbeaten streak to face the San Jose Earthquakes (14th place, Western Conference, 21 points) on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4
